name: charter
description: At SessionStart, a compact project brief that flags missing Claude-facing docs (project map, roadmap/backlog, recorded decisions), injects git-derived "scar tissue" hotspots (files repeatedly fixed), and reminds the model of the non-technical owner loop. Adds a Stop-time alignment gate that checks a finished change against recorded decisions, plus the /charter:align command to reconcile open work on demand. Read-only over the project.
